pi_items.source: setup_data.py:191 explicitly creates product named 'Office Chair'; setup_task.sh:32 searches for and confirms product existence; setup_task.sh:42-52 creates alert for this product

setup_task.sh:26 cleans up filters with this name; export_result.sh:42 searches for filter with exact name; task.json description line 5 states 'Save this filter to your Favorites with the exact name \'Chairs Only\''; verifier.py:29 expects this metadata value

setup_task.sh:26 specifies model_id='quality.alert' in search domain; export_result.sh:42 searches ir.filters for quality.alert model; entire task operates on quality.alert records created in setup_task.sh:42-64

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a custom search filter on the Odoo quality.alert model. The target product is 'Office Chair', a synthetically generated product created via XML-RPC during task setup. The filter must be saved with the exact name 'Chairs Only'. All data is synthetic, created by setup_data.py and setup_task.sh scripts that populate an Odoo database with test alerts and products. The task model is quality.alert, Odoo's built-in quality control alerts model.
